sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n74286" key="o)cuqumi/as" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀξῠθῡμ-ίας</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n74286.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one who is quick to anger,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:2:231" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.231</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:6:124" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.124</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
